Insigible what kind of sea creature do you want to see in Morimens?
an interesting sea creature would be a siphonophore, specifically [praya dubia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Praya_dubia)

embeds.title: Praya dubia
embeds.description:
Praya dubia, the giant siphonophore, lives in the mesopelagic zone to bathypelagic zone at 700 m (2,300 ft) to 1,000 m (3,300 ft) below sea level. It has been found off the coasts around the world, from Iceland in the North Atlantic to Chile in the South Pacific.
Praya dubia is a member of the order
